initMessage:
```Hello, You can talk to the tutors for {subject} here.```
All tutors will be notified **once staff approves of your enquiry.**
# Make sure to **not share contact info in any way** 
As this is against the <#1437161364568277013>. 
(Examples include: Emails, Phone numbers, Discord IDs, etc. ) 
-# You may ask your questions regarding the tutors plans, or any other questions. 
Be careful with your first message as **only your first message will reach the tutors.** 
-# You may continue to talk uninterrupted once staff approves of your enquiry.

Hi! I would like to join the group lesson for IGCSE add math I would like to know what is the payment methods

Which country are you currently in?
Based on that we can decide the payment method.
Malaysia
That's perfect, you can send it through Al Rajhi Bank.

I will share the details once the tutor and you both confirm.
You can then open a modmail ticket for payments by sending a DM to the bot. <@1475940201347022878>
Well there isn't an igcse add maths group session available right now unfortunately,unless you come with multiple people yourself then in that case yeah.
Also unfortunately there was a price change but the ad hadn't been updated yet so for one-to-one it's 7.5usd and group sessions are half that per person, is that alright with you?
Regarding payment methods you can just inform me which payment method you'd like to use and I'll tell you if that works. but direct bank transfers are preferred.

Oh right yeah sorry

inshallah soon this is getting sad

Hello 
I would like a tutor for IGCSE maths . 
I want to understand topics better and be able to solve any type of math problems by myself. I do struggle with non calculator paper and a few topics from calculator paper. So a clear explanation and guided solving of paper or topical questions would be helpful. I have my exam in October November 2026. So I would need a lot of practice to get above 95 marks in both papers.

Hello
Thanks for reaching out, so time will be a bit tight during the timeframe you're interested in as several other students have already booked lessons in this timeframe, however it will still be possible to do lessons hopefully. I just need to ask how many hours of tutoring a week you are interested in since that will affect scheduling/I need to know to tell you if that amount of time is suitable this time period.
2 to 3 class a week works and 4 classes a week before exams.
1hr 30 mins

sticky.title: Looking for *your* subject tutor in *this* crowd?
sticky.body:
Try smashing that search icon, and type *only* your subject name.
And you're gonna get all the available tutors for that subject. For all levels.

messages.text:
Dear Application Team, 

I'm an experienced tutor offering help in math and science for middle school, high school, and university students.

About me:
• IB Graduate 
• 6 years of tutoring experience
• 3rd-year Biomedical Sciences student
• Experienced in working with students from many levels, from test preparation to general building of fundamentals

I focus on explaining concepts in a clear manner to students, helping them actually understand the material as opposed to memorizing. As well as this, I keep up with them and am open to help outside of sessions. I've helped students significantly improve their grades (very often from 60s to 90s). 

My subjects are: 

• Mathematics
-Middle School
-AP / IB SL& HL
-Calculus I, II, & III
-Statistics I & II

• Chemistry
-Middle School
-AP / IB SL & HL
-General Chemistry I & II
-Organic Chemistry I & II
-Biochemistry I & II

• Biology
-Middle School
-AP / IB SL & HL
-General Biology I & II
-Cell Biology I & II 
-Molecular Biology
-Genetics, etc.

• Physics 
-Middle School
-AP & IB SL/HL
-General Physics I & II
-Medical Physics I & II
-Biophysics I & II

I would love to help contribute to Tutorshelp!

Just for the formalities.

You mentioned 30usd for one class (one on one), and you have 8 classes a month.
So a single month (8 classes) of one on one igcse biology will cost someone 240usd, is that right?

Apart from that, students are allowed to take a demo session before they pay, are you okay with that?
As for the video, you have wirrten "you can conduct a demo"
Could you please make a short video explaining a small topic, this is for us.
And you may share the image testimonial
It’s mid night here right now, I’ll record it for you tmr is that fine ?

Yup no worries at all, there's no deadline

Hope we can help you find students!

Also, you mentioned your country of residence is Pakistan, and in your resume it says your university is in Sydney..
Are you living in Sydney or Pakistan... (for time zone)

✨ I Offer a Free Demo Session ✨

I’ve always believed that effective learning starts with understanding the student, not just the subject.

Every learner has a unique psychology, pace, and way of grasping concepts — and as a tutor, it’s my responsibility to adapt to students 

That’s why I offer a free demo session 🤍

🔹 It helps me understand the learning style, goals, and expectations
🔹 It allows them to experience my teaching approach — no pressure, no commitment
🔹 Together, we see if we’re the right fit for long-term learning

A demo session is beneficial for both of us — they decide if they would  like to continue, and I ensure I can truly meet their needs and support their academic growth 🌱
Yes
Also there are some certain students who can’t afford so I judge them and the circumstances in my demo and if my intuition allows me to offer discount, I do !
I’ll share it with the recording tmr .
My course of university is online. So my residence is Pakistan hence I’ll be following Pakistani time zone.

And as of now we have fixed prices.. Meaning if you decided 240usd a month it stays that

Though of course, the second month onwards it's all between you and the student, so you may change things to your liking,
